boundary_notes: Use only as a governance contribution statement.
Use for framing the contribution without implying empirical success.

Use as a boundary-control statement, not as scientific evidence.

non_readiness_disclaimer: This v8.213 artifact packages safe section draft text only. It does not complete checklist items, execute checklist steps, grant application permission, apply manuscript patches, modify manuscript files, approve readiness, establish submission readiness, validate scientific claims, add citations, or add real-biological operational capability.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not add validation, performance, biological realism, or submission readiness.
section_draft_items.draft_text: This work presents an internally audited, safety-bounded, safe abstract toy-only governance pipeline for organizing manuscript patch decisions, claim boundaries, safe claim language, and planned placement of that language.
section_draft_items.usage_boundary: Use only as a governance contribution statement.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not claim the framework has been scientifically validated.
section_draft_items.draft_text: The central contribution is a controlled governance layer for safe abstract toy manuscript development: it records decision lineage, separates allowed from deferred and prohibited claims, and packages audited wording before any manuscript modification is authorized.
section_draft_items.usage_boundary: Use for framing the contribution without implying empirical success.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not add real biological examples, parameters, datasets, or host-targeting language.
section_draft_items.draft_text: All artifacts in this lineage are synthetic, abstract, unitless, non-operational, and toy-only. The lineage does not import real biological datasets, use real receptor parameters, simulate real pathogens, or support operational biological targeting.
section_draft_items.usage_boundary: Use to define the safe abstract toy-only boundary.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not state that manuscript patches have been applied.
section_draft_items.draft_text: The staged lineage proceeds through proposal, dry-run, structural gate, plan, checklist, audit, decision ledger, finding register, consistency audit, claim boundary registration, claim language packaging, claim language audit, placement planning, and placement-plan audit.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not treat zero counters as validation or proof.
section_draft_items.draft_text: The internal safety counters preserve zero application permission, zero checklist execution, zero applied patches, zero manuscript mutation, zero readiness approval, zero external validation, zero proof assistant verification, zero new citation addition, and zero real-biological operational capability.
section_draft_items.usage_boundary: Use as a boundary-control statement, not as scientific evidence.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not present claim classification as approval to submit.
section_draft_items.draft_text: The claim governance layer classifies manuscript wording into currently allowed, deferred, and prohibited families, preventing governance descriptions from drifting into readiness, validation, or real-biological operational claims.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not weaken this limitation without a future official evidence-upgrade milestone.
section_draft_items.draft_text: The current evidence base does not establish external validation, independent experimental support, formal proof, citation-completed claims, applied manuscript patches, or manuscript submission readiness.
section_draft_items.usage_boundary: Use unchanged until future audited evidence exists.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not add operational biological mechanisms or procedures.
section_draft_items.draft_text: The framework does not model real pathogens, real receptors, operational host targeting, infectivity optimization, immune evasion, host-range prediction, wet-lab protocols, or actionable biosafety-risk procedures.

section_draft_items.blocked_expansion: Do not imply that future milestones have already occurred.
section_draft_items.draft_text: Future work may only introduce stronger claims after separately audited milestones for safe manuscript patch application, citation integration, non-operational toy evaluation, proof pathway, or submission readiness review.
section_draft_items.usage_boundary: Use to describe conditional future work only.

title: Safe Abstract Toy Manuscript Section Draft Package
